prompt: You are given a photograph. Preserve it almost entirely: keep the woman EXACTLY as she is, same face, hair, body, pose and her deep red dress with white polka dots, ruffled straps and gathered neckline; do not alter or recolour the dress. Keep the warm sunny lighting, the soft palm-frond shadow on the wall, the colour grade and the overall composition identical. Make only these changes: (1) Make the timber shutter on the right noticeably more rustic and weathered: faded and chipped sage-green paint peeling in places, aged grey wood grain showing through, small cracks and old rusted metal hinges. (2) Add a weathered terracotta pot holding a small olive plant in the bottom-left corner, partially cropped by the left frame edge, sitting on the stone ground. Let a few small dried leaves rest on the ground nearby for realism. Keep everything photorealistic and seamless, matching the existing sunlight and shadow direction.
